description_long: This is an adult male figure with a bald head, dressed in a fitted, long-sleeve top featuring a bold, abstract pattern and matching pants. The top has a prominent design on the chest and sleeves, with a mix of light and dark tones, and the pants are similarly patterned, extending down to the ankles. The figure's hands are relaxed at the sides, and the shoes are athletic in style, complementing the overall sporty appearance. The facial features are neutral, and the body proportions are realistic, suggesting an average adult build. The clothing appears to be made from a synthetic, slightly glossy material, giving a modern, urban look. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the figure is in a supine, straight posture.
description: A bald adult male in patterned, fitted athletic wear and sneakers, lying flat with arms at the sides. The clothing is modern and sporty, with no visible accessories.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full head, chest pattern, and arm placement.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, body, and shoe details.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back pattern of the top and pants, as well as the back of the shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, with similar body and shoe details as the left.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted athletic wear with long sleeves and matching pants
attribute_posture: lying flat on the back with arms at the sides
